Enum esriSRParameterType

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

The available predefined parameters.

[Guid("626441B0-CA8D-11D1-BC93-0000F875BCCE")]
public enum esriSRParameterType

Fields

esriSRParameter_Azimuth = 100004

100004: Azimuth, Alpha.

esriSRParameter_CentralMeridian = 100010

100010: Central Meridian, Lambda 0.

esriSRParameter_CentralParallel = 100020

100020: Central Parallel, Phi 0.

esriSRParameter_FalseEasting = 100001

100001: False Easting, X0.

esriSRParameter_FalseNorthing = 100002

100002: False Northing, Y0.

esriSRParameter_LatitudeOf1st = 100023

100023: Latitude of first point, Phi 1.

esriSRParameter_LatitudeOf2nd = 100024

100024: Latitude of second point, Phi 2.

esriSRParameter_LatitudeOfCenter = 100022

100022: Latitude of Center, Phi c.

esriSRParameter_LatitudeOfOrigin = 100021

100021: Latitude of Origin, Phi 0.

esriSRParameter_LongitudeOf1st = 100013

100013: Longitude of first point, Lambda 1.

esriSRParameter_LongitudeOf2nd = 100014

100014: Longitude of second point, Lambda 2.

esriSRParameter_LongitudeOfCenter = 100012

100012: Longitude of Center, Lambda c.

esriSRParameter_LongitudeOfOrigin = 100011

100011: Longitude of Origin, Lambda 0.

esriSRParameter_NameDataset = 100047

100047: Datum transformation grid name.

esriSRParameter_ScaleDifference = 100046

100046: Scale difference.

esriSRParameter_ScaleFactor = 100003

100003: Scale Factor, K0.

esriSRParameter_StandardParallel1 = 100025

100025: Standard Parallel 1, Phi 1.

esriSRParameter_StandardParallel2 = 100026

100026: Standard Parallel 2, Phi 2.

esriSRParameter_XAxisRotation = 100043

100043: Rotation around X.

esriSRParameter_XAxisTranslation = 100040

100040: Delta X.

esriSRParameter_YAxisRotation = 100044

100044: Rotation around Y.

esriSRParameter_YAxisTranslation = 100041

100041: Delta Y.

esriSRParameter_ZAxisRotation = 100045

100045: Rotation around Z.

esriSRParameter_ZAxisTranslation = 100042

100042: Delta Z.

esriSRParameter_ZPositiveDirection = 100007

100007: Vertical coordinate system direction of positive coordinates (1 - up, -1 - down)

esriSRParameter_ZShift = 100006

100006: Vertical coordinate system z-shift parameter.
